note: This build environment has no network access to external image hosts (Wikimedia Commons, Unsplash, NASA Image Library and Flickr all return 403 host_not_allowed), so no third-party photography is included. Every visual in the experience is original, hand-drawn vector and procedural artwork created for this project and released with the repository. If you later add photography, list each file here and surface it on /credits.

assets.title: Dinosaur & flora silhouette set (T. rex, Brachiosaurus, Stegosaurus, Triceratops, Velociraptor, Pteranodon, Mosasaurus, sauropod herd, conifer, cycad, fern)
assets.author: Created in-repo for The Age of Dinosaurs

dropInInstructions: Place optimised WebP/AVIF files in public/images/<section>/ (e.g. public/images/jurassic/forest.webp), reference them with next/image, and add one entry per file to the assets array above with title, author, exact source URL and license.
